text: The system shall be developed on the Oracle 9i platform.
The front end of the system shall be developed in Visual Basic.
The system shall use Crystal Reports 9 for reporting.
The database shall use sequential links with surrogate keys.
The system shall interface with a bar-code reader to verify voucher numbers.
The system shall interface with a thumb-print reader for verifying client claim forms.
The system shall generate unique voucher identification numbers with in-built security protocols.
The system shall provide a provision to amend the voucher validity date.
The system shall permit an authorized user to with-hold any voucher number.
The system shall capture master details for every distributor including unique code and address.
The system shall display a warning message upon entry of a duplicate distributor name.
The system shall capture salesman master information including name and contact number.
The system shall automatically calculate the invoice amount as the number of vouchers multiplied by the wholesale price.
The system shall automatically allocate relevant voucher numbers from available stock during distribution.
The system shall generate an automatic Distribution Invoice Number.
The system shall capture Voucher Service Provider (VSP) master information including facility level and registration body.
The system shall automatically change a VSP status to In-active if more than two fraud entries are found.
The system shall capture VSP payment terms including bank account details and payment frequency.
The system shall automatically generate a Staff Code using a suffix of the VSP Code plus a 3-digit sequence.
The system shall print a receipt document upon claim submission.
The system shall capture claim data including patient name, age, gender, and doctor notes.
The system shall automatically generate a Claim Number using the Hospital Code plus an 8-digit sequence.
The system shall calculate the claim amount based on the MSIU treatment matrix.
The system shall compare the captured thumb impression with previous visits for the same voucher number.
The system shall check if a returned voucher was sold to the specific distributor before accepting a sales return.
The system shall automatically populate client address and syndrome details based on the Voucher Number during feedback entry.
The system shall restrict access to modules and screens based on User Group privileges.
The system shall require the Password and Verify Password fields to be equal before saving user information.
The system shall prevent the creation of User Groups or individual users with existing names.
